programme.title: E6 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn’s frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E3 - Leave No Man Behind
programme.desc: Bear drops the contestants off in the middle of a bay where they must swim to shore and, in their haste, a team is left behind. Once on the shore, they must navigate waterfalls, where an injury takes the group by storm.

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs Are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. Experts from various fields provide customized training methods and tailored advice - helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs Are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. Experts from various fields provide customized training methods and tailored advice - helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: #StudentAstronaut Contest: Russia
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli holds the fourth annual #StudentAstronaut Contest. One lucky student wins a trip to Russia to train like a cosmonaut at the Yuri Gagarin Cosmonaut Training Center.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: Wind Beneath Your Wings
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make the perfect paper plane using symmetry. He finds out that real planes use the same principle as paper planes – when the fins point up and air hits them at high speed, the front of the plane is pushed up and the plane rises.

programme.title: Ruby's Smelly Foot
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are on the farm, hoping to discover some pregnant cows. Poor Fern, the lurcher, has been abandoned and needs a new home. Ruby, the lamb, has a smelly infected foot, and Johnny and Inel meet a dog who likes to join the family for dinner!

programme.title: Dove's Last Chance
programme.desc: The entire Acro Squad performs at an open-air festival. Dove needs a new partner if she wants to make it to the World Championships, and her performance is the last chance for Coach Nikki to find her a match. Meanwhile, Chase decides to ask Lainie out on a date.

programme.title: Super Shape!
programme.desc: Eric learns why the triangle is such an important shape for building. He builds a bridge made of straws that is so strong that he can balance several books on it.

programme.title: Console Of The Future
programme.desc: Robbie has his eye on an expensive console but when his birthday arrives he receives a cheap knock off instead. He's disappointed until he finds out that the controller he's been given has the power to control other people.

programme.title: The Double Mystery
programme.desc: Addison is faced with a double challenge: figuring out who is behind a series of very strange thefts in Ayrton Park, and then when she does discover that the perpetrator is her own mother, getting to the bottom of why her mom seems to have gone over to the “dark side”.

programme.title: S'no Trouble
programme.desc: When Fico can't yodel down an avalanche of snow from the clubhouse roof, Doki wonders what does cause avalanches? Luckily, it's time for their ski trip to Innsbruck, Austria. The team must find a way to start a real, controlled avalanche, to make things safe again!

programme.title: Pizza Box
programme.desc: After a nice hearty meal, let's get DIY-ing with Hepi and Briko.

programme.title: Coin
programme.desc: What to do with all that spare change? Hepi and Briko have an idea for you.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Egg Day
programme.desc: Egg day is finally here. It is a great day until Cleopatra comes to steal the eggs. She wants the new Bhilkans to follow her rules. But it seems that ruling new baby Bhilkans is harder than she thought.

programme.title: A Cat-tastic Work of Art!
programme.desc: Abdul should convince Granny Pina to sign a paper allowing Winston to bulldoze her house and build a giant shopping mall. Kataly and the Buffycats call all their furry fellows to turn the house into a cat-tastic work of art!

programme.title: The Pea Princess' Granddaughter
programme.desc: Rose, Hawk, Astoria, Travis, and Joy meet Bea, the granddaughter of the Princess and the Pea. Bea, sweet but strict, threatens to fail everyone. Rose realizes Bea's grouchiness is due to poor sleep, leading the team on a quest to find her a more comfortable bed.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Rooster
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Rooster. Rooster needs to wake up the farmer so he can feed the animals but he has a sore throat and can't crow.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Car
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly old Racing Car. He learns about engines and finds out that Racing Car has never actually finished a race.

programme.title: Skateboard Showdown
programme.desc: Fico is eager to prove to his cousin Rico that he's the better skateboarder. So they all head to a skate park in Shanghai, China, to enter a big competition! But they discover that it's a team event. Is it really so important to be the best?

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Adventure
programme.desc: While practicing some circus-style tricks, team Doki gets an idea to put on a real circus show for all their friends of the Worldwide Expedition Club. Doki wants it to be amazing, so they set off to a real circus to find out how to put on the Greatest Show on Earth.

programme.title: Journey Back to the Moon
programme.desc: NASA is planning to not only send humans back to the moon, but also create a permanent residence on the lunar surface. Host Emily Calandrelli explores the different aspects of this historic mission.

programme.title: Super Shape!
programme.desc: Eric learns why the triangle is such an important shape for building. He builds a bridge made of straws that is so strong that he can balance several books on it.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets meet some feisty meerkats who need their claws trimmed, but first, they've got to catch them. Ashanti, the elephant, gets his feet and tail cleaned. Johnny and Inel discover what you get when you cross a lion and a tiger.

programme.title: Life-Changing Operation
programme.desc: Just when Jamie thought he'd conquered his fear of goats, he's sent to the Highlands to track down and treat a giant mountain goat that needs its hooves trimmed. And there's a life-changing operation for a border collie, Joke.

programme.title: Goodbye Dear Eel Friends
programme.desc: When Wapiti's eel friends get trapped on their journey downstream, the kids use hydropower to help them on their way.

programme.title: Neurons, Neurons, Neurons!
programme.desc: Eric learns that neurons are the brain's tiny building blocks. He does an experiment to show what they are and how they work. He is surprised to learn that giraffes have neurons that are five metres long.

programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: E901 - Dino Smash!
programme.desc: When Zeg floats away on a kite, Blaze must team up with Zeg's three sisters to rescue him! 'Meg, Peg, and Egg... save Zeg!'

programme.title: E526 - Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise / Pups Save A Tower Of Pizza
programme.desc: Rocky and the Pups are fixing an Old-Timey Junk Car for Ace Sorensen's Birthday! // Adventure Bay is working hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas!

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: E112 - The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E114 - The Treasure Hunt / Going Into The Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: E237 - Rebecca Rabbit
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to Rebecca Rabbit's house today. It is a bit different to Peppa's house; it is inside a hill, with tunnels instead of stairs. They enjoy playing rabbits and everyone is surprised when George discovers he likes carrots!

programme.title: E239 - Nature Trail
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are driving out to the countryside to go for a walk in the woods. Peppa and George discover trails of footprints left by little birds and ants.

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: E813 - Trouble Brewing / The Cling and I
programme.desc: To help Lori out, Luan gets her a job at the Burnt Bean, where Luan is the boss. // Lana struggles to shake off Lily when she starts to follow Lana around like a shadow.

programme.title: E319 - Everybody Loves Leni
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together.

programme.title: E109 - No Friend In Sight
programme.desc: Chloe feels smothered by Max and Phoebe, and encourages them to make new friends. However, the twins unwittingly make the same friend, and begin a battle for the ages over her. Chloe's new alone time is interrupted by living room-crashing pelican.

programme.title: E210 - Dylan and Rebecca's Cleve-Land-Land Adventure
programme.desc: The Alexanders get another visit from Young Dylan, whose cousin Rebecca joins Sadie at the launch event for the new version of their favorite video game, while Dylan enlists Lay Lay to help get his music on the game soundtrack.

programme.title: E1001 - Summer Camp: The Grate Outdoors / Summer Camp: Don't Lose Your Cool
programme.desc: At Camp Mastodon, Lynn pushes an overly-cautious Lisa to become more adventurous. // When Lori learns her Camp Mastodon campers think she's uncool, she tries to impress them by breaking the rules.

programme.title: E210 - Dylan and Rebecca's Cleve-Land-Land Adventure
programme.desc: The Alexanders get another visit from Young Dylan, whose cousin Rebecca joins Sadie at the launch event for the new version of their favorite video game, while Dylan enlists Lay Lay to help get his music on the game soundtrack.

programme.title: E512 - The Whole Bilsky Family
programme.desc: Henry's nerves are put the test when Piper invites her new boyfriend and his family over for dinner.

programme.title: E208 - Dubu
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam!

programme.title: E303 - Roadie to Nowhere / A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: E211 - The App Came Back
programme.desc: Lay Lay's avatar creator visits Sadie with some changes to the app settings, turning Lay Lay's personality negative, while Sadie tries to restore her best friend's positivity and convince the techie not to shut down the app completely.

programme.title: E1002 - Summer Camp: Treasure Haunt / Summer Camp: Brawl of the Wild
programme.desc: When Lincoln finds an old pirate's flag at Camp Mastodon, he accidentally raises a zombified Captain Kit! // At Camp Mastodon, Leni clashes with another camp counselors, River, while taking their campers on an excursion in the woods.

programme.title: E291 - Swimming Fools / The Goobfather
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip. // Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds 'Patty Whips' to the menu at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E408 - Can't Hardly Wait
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Fast Talk With Boy Abunda
programme.desc: The latest multi-platform showbiz news and talk show on Kapuso network.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Fast Talk With Boy Abunda
programme.desc: The latest multi-platform showbiz news and talk show on Kapuso network.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Morning Call
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

The Woman Who Lives For Sex
My Friend Is An Escort Lady Vol.7
E7
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E32 - In Selestat (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Selestat, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the Alsace Wine Route and in the Sainte-Foy Church.

programme.title: E3 - Autumn As The Water Flows
programme.desc: A journey that offers an immersion in all the beauty of autumn, on the idyllic lakes of Switzerland. For most of their inhabitants, this lakeland environment is not merely fascinating but also ensures shelter and a chance to stock up on food before the season changes.

programme.title: E97
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E3 - Fried Chicken Monte Cristo
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: E22 - Chicken Fricassee
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a Southern spin on the classic French-inspired chicken fricassee. She starts by seasoning and browning the chicken, then simmers it in a sauce made with vegetables, cream and white wine.

programme.title: E28 - Greek Meatballs And Spaghetti With Feta Sauce
programme.desc: Rachael takes us on a Grecian adventure with a recipe for Greek-style lamb meatballs and her very own creation, feta-sghetti, a spaghetti dish served with a decadent white feta sauce.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: On a friendship trip to Thailand with real friends, the 'Dokbakz' gather to celebrate. Their joy is short-lived, as they decide to pick the one who will shoulder the cost of the accommodation.

programme.title: E15 - Jacinthe And Serge
programme.desc: Serge and Jacinthe have often travelled to the East Coast over the years to visit family. Now they want to find a permanent home for their visits, one they can pass down for generations.

programme.title: E4 - Chicken Gizzard And Poutine
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a smothered chicken gizzard poutine, which mixes traditional, Southern-fried chicken gizzards with French-Canadian fries, gravy and cheese curds for a decadent global meal.

programme.title: E23 - Deep South Bouillabaisse
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.title: E31 - Spicy Chicken Thighs
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a family-friendly, go-to meal of sauteed chicken thighs marinated with chilli crisp, cooked with mango salsa and served with steamed vegetables.

programme.title: The Forest Makers Of The Mata Atlantica
programme.desc: An NGO has been planting araucaria trees for 40 years to protect Brazil's Atlantic rainforest. In India, the AI boom is leading to increasing conflicts over water supply.

programme.title: Novel Ways To Power Environmental Change In Africa
programme.desc: Youth humor to fight fossil fuels, solar grandmas in Ghana; bamboo to save homes from landslides and sacred sites protecting biotopes in Uganda.

programme.title: When Mudslides Threaten Mountain Villages
programme.desc: In the Alps, villages are increasingly threatened by flows of mud and debris. The problem reached new heights in 2025, when the Swiss mountain village of Blatten was nearly completely buried by a huge avalanche.

programme.title: Homo Plasticus - The Plastic Inside Us
programme.desc: All organisms harbor an invisible, omnipresent enemy: plastic. Researchers worldwide have shown that plastic particles can also be detected in humans - in organs and bodily fluids.

programme.title: How This Tiny Country Became The Best At Night Trains In Europe
programme.desc: As Europe's rail giants scrapped their sleeper cars, one tiny country went all‑in. Austria's OEBB has built the continent's largest night train network, carrying millions across borders while everyone else hit the brakes. Here's how Austria quietly conquered the night.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E3 - Passing On
programme.desc: Paquet House is supporting two families with their restoration adventures. Elisa Gouin has inherited a family passion for her ancestral home. And a traditional builder passes on his know-how to his son.

programme.title: E16 - Scissors
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E1793
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: La Volante
programme.desc: While he is taking his wife to hospital to give birth, Thomas hits and kills a young man on the road. The young man's mother Marie-France, is devastated. Nine years later, without revealing her identity, she becomes Thomas' secretary and gets more and more involved in his life.

programme.title: Foreigners
programme.desc: Jim, 15, is deeply shaken by the arrival of Neil, his British father whom he hasn't seen in five years. The teenager is about to be adopted by his stepfather, with whom he has formed a true bond. But Neil refuses to give up his parental rights...

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: C'est Du Belge:2025-2026
programme.desc: In the company of Gerald Watelet, focus on the best ambassadors of Belgian culture and heritage, on the behind-the-scenes of unmissable events and portraits of personalities making the news.

programme.title: Showbiz Spy
programme.desc: Cercis Lui goes undercover in this lively comedy as an officer of the 'International Association for the Physical and Mental Health Development of Underage Boys and Girls” dedicated to protecting young boys and girls from being exploited in their pursuit of pop stardom. When tasked with taking down a shady talent show and its mastermind, Big Boss, Cercis must disguise himself as a woman to enter the competition. Only then can he get close enough to gather the evidence to take down the criminal ring. Joining this outlandish operation are Helianthus - an entertainment reporter, Circle O – a wannabe popstar, Lilium - a notorious artist and Oval O – cousin of Circle O from the US. But does this ragtag team have what it takes to triumph over the shady side of the business?

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E261 -THE SHADOW'S EDGE
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E253 -She’s Got No Name
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: My Lucky Star
programme.desc: Going nowhere in love and stuck in life as a lowly travel agent, Sophie finds escape in her own comic book creations. When she was winning the office contest for a prize trip to Singapore suddenly turns her life upside in the best way possible, as she meets there the man of her dreams: David, the handsome super-spy from her own comics. Before she can even get pack her luggage together, off they jump from the Marina Bay Sands Skydeck, and the chase is on for a lip-shaped key to the billion-dollar diamond called “Lucky Star Diamond”, a diamond capable of destroying the world, one country at a time.

programme.title: Alienoid
programme.desc: In the year 2022, Guard and Thunder live on Earth, managing alien prisoners who have been locked up in humans' brains. One day, a spacecraft appears in the sky over Seoul, and the police detective Moon witnesses a strange sight...Meanwhile 630 years earlier during the Goryeo Dynasty, the hapless dosa (Korean tao magician) Muruk and Ean, the so-called “The Girl Who Shoots Thunder”, each scramble to outwit each other in pursuit of the mystical Divine Blade, for which a huge reward is being offered. Two sorcerers in search of the Divine Blade's secrets, Madam Black and Mr. Blue, as well as the masked Jajang, also set out on a desperate scramble to obtain the Blade. Meanwhile, a spacecraft emerges from a deep river, emitting light...Those who pursue alien prisoners locked in human bodies in the year 2022, and the sorcerers who pursue the legendary Divine Blade in the year 1391... When the door of time opens, everything becomes entangled!

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E261 -THE SHADOW'S EDGE
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: Working-class Taara and wealthy heir Yuvraaj defy class for a deep, undeniable love. But with family honour at stake, can Yuvraaj choose her over his legacy?

programme.title: E5132
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E260 - 2
programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.title: E875
programme.desc: Jhanak, determined to keep her mother's vow, embarks on a life-changing path. Facing hardships and loss, she encounters a man who adds a new layer of complexity to her journey.

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: Legendary Award Winners: Bullet In The Head
programme.desc: In 1967, Hong Kong, Ben, Paul, and Frank are childhood friends and members of a gang. They regularly brawl with members of other gangs...

programme.title: Security Unlimited
programme.desc: Comedy trio the Hui Brothers' produce and star in this hilarious and off the wall laugh-fest and box-office hit, Security Unlimited. Michael Hui stars as head security guard Chou, whose unorthodox, and at times ridiculous approach to training his subordinates doesn't seem to go down well with his boss, Fan (Stanley Fung). Sam (Sam Hui) and Bruce (Ricky Hui) are Chou's favorite targets of abuse, but Chou soon finds the shoe is on the other foot when Ricky gets promoted after saving the day in a botched bank heist.

programme.title: Bullet In The Head
programme.desc: In 1967, Hong Kong, Ben, Paul, and Frank are childhood friends and members of a gang. They regularly brawl with members of other gangs...

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: The contract is a piece of almost blank paper by which MTV binds all its employees to eight years of impecunious service. Chi-Man, an aspiring but frustrated artist, hates the contract since he is given no chance of getting ahead. He constantly thinks of moving to greener pastures. His brother Chi-Ying is a self-made investor who has just come up with a laugh bomb. By chance, Chi-Man becomes the host of a Cat TV program. With the aid of the laugh bomb, he becomes an instant success, yet...

programme.title: The Private Eyes
programme.desc: Joseph Wong (Michael Hui), the kingpin of the Manix Private Detective Agency, a firm believer in tact and thrift. By tact, he means you can cheat all the people all the time and corners are there to be cut. By thrift, he means an underpaid staff is happy and grateful staff. By chance, he employs Lee Kwok Kit (Samuel Hui). Together, they have solved lots of wired cases. One day, while the two are investigating a blackmail case, the movie goes off and the lights come on. Scores of gun-toting hoods hold the more than 1,000 goers as hostages. On the stage Uncle Gaw (Shek Kin) threatens that it is a hold-up!

programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。
